name: Mitchell Hashimoto
contribution_zh: 首次系统性提出并命名 'Engineer the Harness' 概念（2026年2月），奠定了整个领域的理论基础
contribution_en: First systematically proposed and named the 'Engineer the Harness' concept (February 2026), laying the theoretical foundation for the entire field
key_quote_zh: 每当发现 Agent 犯错，就花时间工程化一个解决方案，让 Agent 永远不再犯同样的错误。
key_quote_en: Whenever you find the agent making a mistake, spend time engineering a solution so the agent never makes that mistake again.

name: Ryan Lopopolo
contribution_zh: 主导了 OpenAI 百万行代码零人工编写的 Harness Engineering 实践，发布了最具影响力的工程案例
contribution_en: Led OpenAI's Harness Engineering practice of 1 million lines of code with zero human-written code, publishing the most influential engineering case study

name: Prithvi Rajasekaran
contribution_zh: 设计了 GAN 启发的三 Agent 架构（Planner、Generator、Evaluator），解决长期运行 Agent 的性能瓶颈
contribution_en: Designed the GAN-inspired three-agent architecture (Planner, Generator, Evaluator) to solve performance bottlenecks in long-running agents
key_quote_zh: Harness 设计是前沿 Agentic 编码性能的关键。
key_quote_en: Harness design is key to performance at the frontier of agentic coding.

name: Vivek Trivedy
contribution_zh: 撰写了 Agent Harness 解剖文章，将 LangChain 编码 Agent 从 Top 30 提升至 Top 5
contribution_en: Authored the Agent Harness anatomy article, improving LangChain's coding agent from Top 30 to Top 5
key_quote_zh: Agent = Model + Harness。如果你不是模型，你就是 Harness。
key_quote_en: Agent = Model + Harness. If you're not the model, you're the harness.

name: Birgitta Böckeler
contribution_zh: 在 Martin Fowler 博客上发表了对 Harness Engineering 的深度分析，提出三大组件分类框架
contribution_en: Published an in-depth analysis of Harness Engineering on Martin Fowler's blog, proposing a three-component classification framework
key_quote_zh: 我喜欢'Harness'这个词来描述我们可以用来约束 AI Agent 的工具和实践。
key_quote_en: I like 'harness' as a word to describe the tooling and practices we can use to keep AI agents in check.

name: 卡颂 (kasong2048)
role_zh: 中文 AI 工程社区影响者
contribution_zh: 在中文社区深度传播和实践 Harness Engineering，提出可观测性是最高优先级基建
contribution_en: Deeply propagated and practiced Harness Engineering in the Chinese community, proposing observability as the highest priority infrastructure
key_quote_zh: 做 Harness Engineering，最高优的基建是什么呢？答案是——可观测性，也就是记录 Agent 的所有过程日志。
key_quote_en: What is the highest priority infrastructure for Harness Engineering? The answer is observability — recording all process logs of the agent.

name: Kyle Mistele
contribution_zh: 从实战角度系统性总结了 Harness Engineering 的配置点和最佳实践
contribution_en: Systematically summarized Harness Engineering configuration points and best practices from a practical perspective
key_quote_zh: 这不是模型问题，这是配置问题。
key_quote_en: It's not a model problem. It's a configuration problem.

name: Cassie Kozyrkov
role_zh: Kozyr CEO，前 Google 首席决策科学家
role_en: CEO of Kozyr, former Chief Decision Scientist at Google
contribution_zh: 从监督和决策科学角度阐释 Harness Engineering，拓展了概念的应用边界
contribution_en: Interpreted Harness Engineering from a supervision and decision science perspective, expanding the conceptual boundaries
key_quote_zh: AI 现在写代码了。真正重要的技能是控制它构建什么。
key_quote_en: AI writes the code now. The skill that matters is controlling what it builds.
